PostToolUse.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE"; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.json$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ (manifest|glossary|conjugation_rules|counter_rules|particles|characters|helper-vocab|package) ]]; then bash hooks/validate-json.sh "$FILE" 2>&1; fi
PostToolUse.description: Validate JSON syntax on every content file edit
